title: Design vs total years of experience, binned pairs, 2023
summary: Binned (design years of experience, total years of experience) response-count pairs across the full 2023 cohort, showing how design tenure relates to total working tenure at the level of individual respondent pairings rather than a single median comparison.
methodology: Points are binned (design YOE, total YOE) response counts aggregated from the 2022–23 survey responses (N=323); no row-level data is published. Each point represents one distinct design-experience/total-experience pairing and the count of respondents reporting exactly that pairing. Aggregated upstream from the raw survey export before reaching this repository.
